markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and prioritize conversion optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Prioritize Tool Pages:** Double down on the successful Tool Pages strategy (10/week). This subfolder is gaining Google authority, driving immediate traffic wins (e.g., the new Discord page is already a top performer).](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [**Implement Tool Page CTAs:** Immediately add CTAs to all Tool Pages to convert the surging traffic. GrowthX will first check for internal dev capacity; if unavailable, Carmel's team will handle it next week.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [**Pause Untrackable Channels:** Pause Reddit agency and influencer marketing. The CEO requires trackable ROI, and these brand-play channels lack direct attribution to the \~20 monthly trials.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [**Plan Tool Page Redesign:** A redesign is planned for the January site launch to improve user experience and conversions by making the "Alternatives" section more prominent.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Tool Pages Drive Growth:** This strategy is driving the most traffic and showing immediate returns.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [**Performance:** Sessions have doubled in the last month.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [**Significance:** This success validates the strategy and aligns with the goal of expanding into the DevOps space.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [**Blog Traffic Stagnation:** Blog traffic growth is limited, split across three entities.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Prioritize the high-ROI Tool Pages over refreshing older blog posts for now.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A refresh project can be revisited in the new year, especially after the site redesign.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic Spike:** Site-level referral traffic from LLMs has seen a significant "hockey stick" spike since September 1st.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1718.0)

### Conversion Optimization: Tool Pages

  - [**Problem:** Surging Tool Page traffic is not converting due to a lack of CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [**Solution: Immediate CTA Implementation**](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [**For integrated tools:** Lift the existing CTA block directly from the corresponding Integration Page.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [**For non-integrated tools:** Use a generic, sticky CTA block.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [**CTA Copy:**](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
      - [**Header:** "Agents don't just route tickets, execute end-to-end, AI-powered request management"](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
      - [**Subheader:** "Knows your tool stack, routes intelligently, and resolves where you work: Slack or Teams."](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
  - [**Solution: Long-Term Redesign**](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
      - [**Goal:** Improve UX and conversions on Tool Pages, which currently hide key content like "Alternatives" below the fold.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Carmel will work with the designer on this for the January site launch.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)

### Channel Strategy & Attribution

  - [**Decision:** Pause the Reddit agency and influencer marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [**Rationale:** These channels are brand plays with no trackable ROI, which the CEO requires for budget justification.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [**Attribution Challenge:** Adding a "Where did you hear about us?" field to the trial signup flow is a known solution but is currently deprioritized.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [**Reason:** The immediate focus is on optimizing the trial-to-pipeline conversion rate, which is currently low.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [Check internal dev capacity for CTA implementation; report timeline to Carmel.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [Provide a list of Tool Pages with existing integration CTAs.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
      - [Add a "Further Reading" section proposal to the conversion analysis doc.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [**Carmel:**](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
      - [Review all pending blog posts by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1368.0)
      - [Implement CTAs on Tool Pages via internal dev (if GrowthX cannot).](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [Work with the designer on the Tool Page redesign for the January site launch.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
      - [Update meta titles/descriptions to reflect the "AI Service Desk" messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/5iVRGhq2TQtQkKziHzjmyN2aB552tkzE?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
